description: Two or more peptide actives presented in one vial or finished blend.
mandatory_evidence: Complete identity package for every component under SC01/SC02/SC03 as applicable
Declared target ratio and batch-specific measured ratio
Total mass balance against label claim
Post-preparation or post-reconstitution stability where relevant
Sterility, endotoxin and particulate evidence for sterile presentation
Evidence-transfer statement confirming that component evidence does not prove blend efficacy
automatic_rejection: Ratio absent or based only on weighed inputs
Clinical evidence transferred from individual components to the blend
